dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6632 IH: El Paso Air Traffic Control Tower Modernization Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Escobar introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Appropriations

form.official-title: To make appropriations for the replacement of the air traffic control tower at El Paso International Airport in El Paso, Texas.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the El Paso Air Traffic Control Tower Modernization Act.

section.header: Appropriation for air traffic control tower
section.text: There are hereby appropriated, out of any money in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, such sums as may be necessary for the replacement of the El Paso Air Traffic Control Tower at the El Paso International Airport in El Paso, Texas.
